Age Calculator

Calculate your exact age in years, months, and days. Find out how many days you've been alive.

FAQ

How is age calculated?

Age is calculated by finding the difference between your birth date and today's date, broken down into years, months, and days.

Can I calculate age between two dates?

Yes, enter any two dates to find the exact time difference between them.
